name: save_constraints
full_help:
save_constraints

Description: 
Save the current design's constraints

Syntax: 
save_constraints  [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-force]    Force constraints save, overwriting the target and source XDC 
              if necessary
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Force constraints save, overwriting the target and source XDC if necessary
Suspend message limits during command execution
